final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a steampunk mechanical apparatus (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "蒸汽朋克" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Victorian industrial engraving print tradition, Hayao Miyazaki's mechanical world-building (Castle in the Sky / Howl's Moving Castle), 1980s European steampunk illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include complex gears, pipes, and gauges as the focal mechanical assembly
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a precise yet vintage industrial atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brass and copper dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a brass and copper surface treatment with Victorian ornamental detailing — exact grain / sheen / patina weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
